title: autobench.failure_pattern v1
description: Auto-surfaced structural failure cluster: a leading-prefix bucket of non-OK cases that all share the same first prefix_len_chars of generated code (after whitespace normalisation). One event is emitted per detected pattern per RSI iteration, before the improver runs, so the harness can use the signal in its mutation. Source: /autobench.

iteration.description: RSI iteration number this pattern was detected in

prefix.description: Normalised leading prefix shared by every case in the cluster. Leading whitespace stripped; newlines collapsed to '|'.

sample_count.description: Number of cases in this prefix bucket

total_in_class.description: Total number of cases with this verdict in the iteration (sample_count / total_in_class = share of the failure class explained by this prefix)

sample_case_ids.description: Up to 5 case_ids from the cluster, in encounter order, for spot-checking

prefix_len_chars.description: The prefix-length parameter used by the detector (defaults to 20)
